edits.slides.0.title: Making everyday clinician work feel like less work
edits.slides.5.title: How I tested the redesign
edits.slides.5.sections.2.content: I ran the new flows past 8 clinicians and watched them work. The consolidated patient view, single-screen editing, and protocol builder each fixed one of the three breakdowns.
edits.slides.6.subtitle: Where clinicians land first — and where they got lost most.
edits.slides.14.title: What changed: faster days, fewer mistakes, more people actually using it
